title: Cause of Remembrance & Forgetfulness | BG 15.12 - 15.15 | HG Amitasana Das | HKM Mumbai
speaker: HG Amitasana Dasa

segments.text: Today's discussion is, the topic is, Cause of Remembrance and Forgetfulness.
Based on the teachings of Srila Prabhupada, His Divine Grace A.C. Bhaktivedanta Swami Srila Prabhupada.
Text 12. The splendor of the sun which dissipates the darkness of this whole world comes from me.
And the splendor of the moon and the splendor of fire are also from me.
These are words spoken by Lord Shri Krishna.
The unintelligent cannot understand how things are taking place.
World over lot of effort is being put to figure out how the world came about.
What is the origin of this universe? Billions of dollars worth of experiments are being conducted.
And still there is no consensus, there is no clarity.
How different, although we have figured out various laws, laws of gravity and various other forces.
Which are acting in this material world.
But here in this particular verse, Krishna is saying that I am the splendor of the sun.
Sun which is generating so much of heat and light.
It's not happening by chance, it's not happening by accident.
There is a very intelligent design.
And Lord is saying, I am behind it.
without their help of sun, moon and fire, no living entity can survive.
So it is so integral part of our life, sun, moon.
One can easily understand that they are living by the mercy of the Supreme Lord.
So a person who is little thoughtful, little intelligent, little God conscious will understand that in our daily life,
This world is designed in such a way that we can keep God out of picture.
It can appear that as God things are working fine.
But a person who is in knowledge, who is God conscious will understand that
it's not, Lord is very thickly involved in everything.
You may try to ignore, you may try to overlook.
You may not agree to believe.
But the fact remains that the Lord is an integral part of our lives.

Attain the supreme goal, who is no other than.
Now, when we tread the path shown by the Vedas,
we move in the direction of achieving the ultimate goal, the supreme goal,
which is none other than the Supreme Personality of Godhead.
It is me to be known from all the Vedas.
